The Experience

The room beginsbefore you do.

Experienced, not observed.

About Micro

A sensory-led strength space, intentionally designed.

Precision over intensity. Adaptation over exhaustion. Culture over noise.

The Lagree Microformer sits at the centre, with recovery, nutrition, sound, scent and community held as one practice. The room is built to settle the nervous system before the body moves.

Manifesto

More than movement.

Art, music, design and community are part of the practice, not adornments to it. We believe in joie de vivre as the ultimate form of longevity. Not only alive, but living.

The space is not decoration. It is the method.

Our values

A discipline, not an aesthetic. Every part of the MICRO experience is chosen with reason.

Intentional

Chosen with reason. A discipline, not an aesthetic.

Precise

The science real, the method exact. Rigour without pressure.

Cultured

Art, music and connection, never decoration.

Collaborative

The best in their field, brought into the room.

Ground · Ignite · Restore

A three-part method for strength, regulation and long-term transformation.

Settle the system. Build with precision. Leave restored.

Ground
Settle before you move
Ignite
Strength through precision
Restore
Change that holds
Featured pathways

The formats

Every modality chosen for its merit. Every programme led by the foremost in their field. Named to those who come closer.

Featured

Movement (Controlled strength)

Featured

Recovery (Restoration)

Featured

Nutrition (Ritual)

Founding access

Be part of the first circle, before the doors open.

Sixty founding memberships. By invitation only.

MICRO

A space for internal recalibration.
Precision. Control. Regulation.
